title: Paths manifest
description: Schema for paths-manifest.json. The manifest is the machine-readable contract between this knowledge repo and downstream consumers (plugin, MCP, docs site). Every meaningful artifact gets a paths.<key> entry; aggregate collections (per-component, per-leaf) get a collections.<key> entry. Plugin's vendor-snapshot reads this to know what to pull.

_schema_version.description: Schema version for the manifest contents (not the manifest format itself). Bumps signal coordinated reader updates.

_convention.description: Human-readable note explaining the _-prefix convention for system-managed fields.
examples: Fields prefixed with _ are system-managed (auto_generated, source, schema_version, ...).

manifest_schema_version.description: Manifest FORMAT version (v1, v2, ...). Bumping this is a breaking change that requires downstream reader updates.

knowledge_version.description: Semver string for the knowledge repo's content. Matches package.json#version. Plugin's vendored.json#resolved_version pins to a knowledge_version.

paths.description: Dictionary of named single-file paths. Keys are dot-notation handles consumers use to reference artifacts (e.g. accessibility.index, components.registries.dskit).

collections.description: Dictionary of named directory collections (multiple files matching a pattern). Used for per-component guidelines, per-leaf foundations, etc.

aliases.description: Optional alias map (from-key → canonical-key) for backwards-compatibility renames of paths/collections keys.

registryAliases.description: Optional cross-namespace alias map (registry component key → components.guidelineDoc.byKey slug). Bridges the gap where a Figma/registry component key (e.g. 'checkbox-with-label') differs from the slug its guideline doc is authored under (e.g. 'checkbox'). Distinct from 'aliases', which renames keys within paths/collections. Hand-maintained; interim — see components/src/AUTHORING.md 'Slug naming'.

_notes.description: Free-form documentation block. Keys are arbitrary; values are explanatory strings.

_zones.description: Legibility classification of manifest artifacts by role. Each non-underscore key is a zone name (knowledge | contract | metadata) whose value is an array of top-level manifest-key prefixes. '_pendingEviction' lists consumer-specific prefixes slated to leave the substrate (structure-audit Track E). See ARCHITECTURE.md.

type.description: File format. Affects how consumers parse the file.

origin.description: Who edits the file. human = authored directly; ci = auto-generated; hybrid = mix (humans seed, CI extends).

generator.description: Path to the script that generates this artifact (for origin=ci or hybrid). Omitted for origin=human.

description.description: Human-readable explanation of what the file contains. Drives docs generation.
examples: Master reference for Actian DS — primitives, tokens, scales

dir.description: Repo-relative directory containing the collection members.

pattern.description: Filename pattern with {slug} placeholders. Used by tooling to enumerate members.

recursive.description: Whether to recurse into subdirectories when enumerating. Default false.
